scripts.dev:app:magicblock-local: cd app && VITE_ARCADIA_EXECUTION_ENV=surfpool VITE_RPC_URL=http://localhost:8899 VITE_MAGICBLOCK_LOCAL_ER=true VITE_MAGICBLOCK_ER_RPC_URL=http://localhost:7799 VITE_MAGICBLOCK_TEE_RPC_URL=http://localhost:7799 VITE_MAGICBLOCK_ER_VALIDATOR=mAGicPQYBMvcYveUZA5F5UNNwyHvfYh5xkLS2Fr1mev node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js --config vite.config.ts
scripts.build:app: cd app && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config vite.config.ts
scripts.dev:server:magicblock-local: ARCADIA_STORE=memory ARCADIA_DEMO_MODE=true ARCADIA_SURFPOOL_MODE=true SOLANA_RPC_URL=http://localhost:8899 MAGICBLOCK_ER_RPC_URL=http://localhost:7799 MAGICBLOCK_TEE_RPC_URL=http://localhost:7799 MAGICBLOCK_ER_VALIDATOR=mAGicPQYBMvcYveUZA5F5UNNwyHvfYh5xkLS2Fr1mev MAGICBLOCK_ALLOW_LOCAL_FALLBACK=false cargo run --manifest-path server-rs/Cargo.toml
scripts.media:all: pnpm media:capture && pnpm media:deck && pnpm media:render
